column3: "Ginger reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to lessen swelling or soreness in body parts due to certain health issues.
"Ginger eases digestion" refers to its ability to help break down food and improve stomach functions.
"Ginger relieves nausea and vomiting" refers to its ability to ease feelings of sickness in the stomach, including preventing or reducing instances of vomiting.
"Ginger pain relief" refers to its effectiveness for soothing aches and discomforts using ginger, mainly as an alternative medicine.
"Ginger promotes circulation" refers to its ability to increase blood flow around our body parts by relaxing muscles and dilating blood vessels.
"Ginger boosts immune system" refers to its ability to enhance a person's body defense against illnesses.

"Ginger anti-cancer properties" refers to its ability to potentially prevent or slow down cancer growth due to ginger's 
         active compounds and antioxidants.
"Ginger anti-microbial effects" refers to its ability to hinder the growth of microorganisms without harming human cells.
"Ginger reduces blood sugar levels" refers to its ability to lower the amount of glucose circulating within a person's body, helping to maintain healthier blood sugar control.
"Ginger improves oral health" refers to its ability in providing essential oils with healing properties that can help maintain or even improve dental hygiene when used regularly.
